name: Colyseus
description: Colyseus — Node.js multiplayer game server framework with authoritative state, room lifecycle, and WebSocket transport.

seo.title: Colyseus — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Colyseus: Colyseus — Node.js multiplayer game server framework with authoritative state, room lifecycle, and WebSocket transport.

when_to_use: Authoritative multiplayer game server in Node.js with rooms
Real-time game state sync between 100+ concurrent players
WebSocket-based game backend with built-in room lifecycle
Building turn-based or real-time multiplayer browser games
Self-hosted game server without Photon or Agora licensing

pros: Authoritative server out of the box
cons: Not ideal for heavy physics simulation
Ops still on you unless you use cloud
review.verdict: The default open-source choice for turn-based and casual multiplayer, weaker for shooters.
review.best_for: Indie studios building room-based or turn-based multiplayer in Node
review.not_for: Realtime FPS or MMO workloads needing native performance
